title: acer amplum subsp. tientaiense
intro: Acer amplum subsp. tientaiense, also known as the Taiwanese maple, is a subspecies of deciduous tree in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer amplum subsp. tientaiense include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used in teas, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
